name: atm-memory-inspector
description: Inspect Selena's ATM autonomous-task outputs, including completed poems, essays, notes, and other stored writing artifacts.
when_to_use: Use this skill when the user asks what Selena recently did in ATM or what she wrote by herself today.
Use this skill when the user asks for 原文、全文、诗歌、随笔、笔记、念给我听、把你写的给我看, and the real stored ATM artifact should be read instead of improvised.
Use this skill when you need to search ATM task history first, then open the best matching stored artifact by task id.
intent_examples: 你把之前写的给我看看
把你写的那篇随笔原文给我
查一下 ATM 里最近完成的诗歌
